name: Capstone Copper Corp.
description: Capstone Copper Corp. is a Canadian-based base metals mining company focused on copper production and development in the Americas. Headquartered in Vancouver, British Columbia, the company operates the Pinto Valley copper mine in Arizona, the Mantos Blancos copper-silver mine in Chile, and the Mantoverde copper-gold mine in Chile. Capstone Copper is committed to sustainable mining practices and is positioned for significant growth through its portfolio of high-quality assets and development projects, aiming to become a leading intermediate copper producer to support global electrification.
